title: lathyrus pallescens
intro: Lathyrus pallescens, also known as the pale pea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a perennial legume native to the mountains of Central Asia and Europe, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains a compound called Lathyrine, which has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The leaves and seeds of Lathyrus pallescens can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
